content:
# M7 Demoted — Not Ready for OSS Launch (2026-03-19)

User decision: M7 is demoted from "OSS Launch" to a smaller scope. The product is not ready for public launch yet.

Reasons:
- Eval numbers show room for improvement (NDCG 0.656, Precision@5 49.6%)
- 3,697 orphaned_node findings in knowledge health — needs investigation
- Ask mode (generation) completely unevaluated
- Graph expansion A/B test shows marginal quality improvement at 34x latency cost
- License decision (AGPL vs Apache-2.0) not made
- No proven multi-repo, multi-team usage yet (only dogfooding)

What M7 becomes: internal quality milestone, not public launch. Focus on hardening, eval improvement, and proving the product works reliably before going public.
